                idx += idx & -idx

        def query(self, idx):

            res = 0

            while idx >0:

                res += self.tree[idx]

                idx -= idx & -idx

            return res

            # l and r are 1-based

            return self.query(r) - self.query(l-1)

    fenwick_trees = [FenwickTree(n) for _ in range(6)]
